title: nymphoides hastata
intro: Nymphoides hastata, also known as yellow water lily or duckweed, is a floating aquatic plant native to Europe and Asia. The plant's leaves and stems have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nymphoides hastata include reducing fever and relieving symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as its potential to protect against certain types of cancer. The herbal preparations of Nymphoides hastata typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and stems, which can be consumed as teas or taken in capsule form.
